library_activities_search.description: 搜尋圖書館舉辦的活動與講座。

library_activities_stats.description: 取得圖書館活動資料的統計資訊。

get_24hour_spaces.description: 取得圖書館中 24 小時開放的空間資訊。

school_activities_news_search.description: 依關鍵字或日期範圍搜尋全校活動公告新聞。

optional_parameters.description: 活動日期範圍，格式為 YYYY-MM-DD,YYYY-MM-DD

school_activities_news_stats.description: 取得全校活動公告新聞資料的統計資訊。

rule_search_by_query.description: 使用語意向量搜尋查詢教務處法規章則（學則、辦法、要點等）。

nchu_cross_program_search_by_keyword.description: 依關鍵字搜尋中興大學學分學程（跨領域學程）課程，支援指定學期與學制（大學部/研究生）。

nchu_course_search_by_keyword.description: 依關鍵字搜尋中興大學課程資料庫中的課程。

optional_parameters.name: limit
optional_parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)

optional_parameters.name: search_fields
optional_parameters.description: Comma-separated fields to search in (default: 科目名稱,上課教師,開課單位,系所名稱,備註)

optional_parameters.name: case_sensitive
optional_parameters.description: Whether search is case sensitive (default: False)

optional_parameters.name: include_syllabus_search
optional_parameters.description: Also search in syllabus content (課程簡述, 課程目標, 每週授課內容, etc.) (default: False)

optional_parameters.name: include_syllabus_in_result
optional_parameters.description: Include full syllabus in results (default: False)

optional_parameters.name: semester
optional_parameters.description: Semester code (e.g., "1142" for 113-2). If not specified, uses the latest semester.

required_parameters.name: department
required_parameters.description: Department name to search for (e.g., 資工系, 文學院, 管理學院)

optional_parameters.name: limit
optional_parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20)

optional_parameters.name: semester
optional_parameters.description: Semester code. If not specified, uses the latest semester.

nchu_course_search_by_type.description: 依課程類別（必修／選修）搜尋課程。

required_parameters.name: course_type
required_parameters.description: Course type to search for (e.g., 必修, 選修)

optional_parameters.name: limit
optional_parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20)

optional_parameters.name: semester
optional_parameters.description: Semester code. If not specified, uses the latest semester.

nchu_course_get_stats.description: 取得課程資料庫的統計資訊（總課程數、系所數等）。

optional_parameters.name: semester
optional_parameters.description: Semester code. If not specified, uses the latest semester.

nchu_course_get_detail.description: 依課程 ID 取得單門課程的詳細資訊與完整大綱。

optional_parameters.name: include_syllabus
optional_parameters.description: Include full syllabus content (課程簡述, 課程目標, 每週授課內容, 教學方法, 評量方法, etc.) (default: True)

optional_parameters.name: semester
optional_parameters.description: Semester code. If not specified, uses the latest semester.

nchu_course_search_by_teacher.description: 依授課教師姓名搜尋課程。

optional_parameters.name: limit
optional_parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20)

optional_parameters.name: semester
optional_parameters.description: Semester code. If not specified, uses the latest semester.

nchu_course_get_teacher_courses.description: 取得特定教師所開設的所有課程清單。

optional_parameters.name: exact_match
optional_parameters.description: Whether to use exact match (default: False)

optional_parameters.name: limit
optional_parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 50)

optional_parameters.name: semester
optional_parameters.description: Semester code. If not specified, uses the latest semester.

nchu_course_get_all_teachers.description: 取得所有授課教師清單及其開課統計數量。

optional_parameters.name: semester
optional_parameters.description: Semester code. If not specified, uses the latest semester.

nchu_course_search_across_semesters.description: Search for courses across multiple semesters. Useful for finding historical course offerings. Note: This may be slow if searching all semesters as it loads data on demand. JSON string containing search results grouped by semester

required_parameters.name: keyword
required_parameters.description: Search keyword (course name, teacher name, etc.)

optional_parameters.name: limit_per_semester
optional_parameters.description: Maximum number of results per semester (default: 10)

optional_parameters.name: search_fields
optional_parameters.description: Comma-separated fields to search in (default: 科目名稱,上課教師,開課單位)

optional_parameters.name: semesters
optional_parameters.description: Comma-separated semester codes to search (e.g., "1142,1141,1132"). If not specified, searches all available semesters.

nchu_course_get_available_semesters.description: Get all available semesters in the course database. JSON string containing list of available semesters with descriptions

nchu_course_search_selectable_courses.description: Search courses that students of a specific department and academic level CAN ENROLL in. This is different from nchu_course_search_by_department which only finds courses OFFERED by a department. This tool finds all courses that a department's students are eligible to enroll in, including: - Courses offered by the same department - Courses offered by OTHER departments but designated for this department's students Academic level rules: - 學士班 (Undergraduate): Can enroll in 學士班 + 碩士班 courses - 碩士班 (Master): Can enroll in 碩士班 + 博士班 courses (NOT undergraduate courses) - 博士班 (PhD): Can enroll in 博士班 courses only - 碩專班 (Executive Master): Can enroll in 碩專班 + 碩士班 + 博士班 courses JSON string containing: - results: List of selectable courses with enrollment info - summary: Count of same-dept vs other-dept courses - search_params: Parameters used for the search including selectable career levels

required_parameters.name: department
required_parameters.description: Department name keyword (e.g., "資工", "電機", "中文")

optional_parameters.name: career
optional_parameters.description: Academic level - 學士班, 碩士班, 博士班, 碩專班, 進修學士班 (default: 學士班)

optional_parameters.name: limit
optional_parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20)

optional_parameters.name: include_other_dept
optional_parameters.description: Include courses offered by other departments but selectable by this department (default: True)

optional_parameters.name: semester
optional_parameters.description: Semester code. If not specified, uses the latest semester.

nchu_course_search_by_time.description: Search courses by class time. JSON string containing search results

optional_parameters.name: period
optional_parameters.description: Class period (1-9 for day classes, A-D for evening classes), optional

optional_parameters.name: limit
optional_parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20)

optional_parameters.name: semester
optional_parameters.description: Semester code. If not specified, uses the latest semester.

nchu_course_get_teacher_history.description: Get a teacher's course history across all semesters. This searches all available semesters to find courses taught by the specified teacher. Note: This may be slow as it loads data from all semesters. JSON string containing teacher's course history grouped by semester

optional_parameters.name: limit_per_semester
optional_parameters.description: Maximum number of courses to show per semester (default: 10)

nchu_course_get_all_departments.description: Get all departments and their course counts. JSON string containing all departments and their course counts

optional_parameters.name: semester
optional_parameters.description: Semester code. If not specified, uses the latest semester.

nchu_course_time_format_help.description: Get help information about class time format codes. JSON string containing time format explanation

nchu_course_search_syllabus.description: Search courses by syllabus content. This tool specifically searches within course syllabus fields including: - 課程簡述 (Course description) - 課程目標 (Course objectives) - 教學方法 (Teaching methods) - 評量方法 (Assessment methods) - 每週授課內容 (Weekly course content) - 教科書與參考書目 (Textbooks and references) - 核心能力與配比 (Core competencies and weightings) - 課程教材 (Course materials) JSON string containing courses with matching syllabus content

required_parameters.name: keyword
required_parameters.description: Search keyword to find in syllabus content

optional_parameters.name: limit
optional_parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)

optional_parameters.name: include_syllabus_in_result
optional_parameters.description: Include full syllabus in results (default: False)

optional_parameters.name: semester
optional_parameters.description: Semester code. If not specified, uses the latest semester.

nchu_course_search_by_teaching_method.description: Search courses by teaching method. Common teaching methods: 講授, 討論, 習作, 實習, 實驗, 專題, 報告, 演講, etc. JSON string containing courses using the specified teaching method

required_parameters.name: method
required_parameters.description: Teaching method to search for (e.g., 實習, 討論, 專題)

optional_parameters.name: limit
optional_parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20)

optional_parameters.name: semester
optional_parameters.description: Semester code. If not specified, uses the latest semester.

nchu_course_search_by_assessment_method.description: Search courses by assessment/evaluation method. Common assessment methods: 期中考, 期末考, 作業, 報告, 實作, 出席, 小考, 作品, etc. JSON string containing courses using the specified assessment method

required_parameters.name: method
required_parameters.description: Assessment method to search for (e.g., 實作, 報告, 期末考)

optional_parameters.name: limit
optional_parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20)

optional_parameters.name: semester
optional_parameters.description: Semester code. If not specified, uses the latest semester.

nchu_course_search_by_sdg.description: Search courses by UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). JSON string containing courses related to the specified SDG

required_parameters.name: sdg_keyword
required_parameters.description: SDG keyword to search for (e.g., 氣候, 永續, 健康, 教育)

optional_parameters.name: limit
optional_parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20)

optional_parameters.name: semester
optional_parameters.description: Semester code. If not specified, uses the latest semester.

nchu_course_get_weekly_content.description: Get weekly course content for a specific course. JSON string containing weekly course content (每週授課內容)

optional_parameters.name: semester
optional_parameters.description: Semester code. If not specified, uses the latest semester.
